version_description: 80’s pop dance feel. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. The entire song really revolves around the 4 chord movement of the intro, but the pre-chorus is a bit more airy and mystical feeling. Solo acts as a bridge. Choruses play as intro. Outro plays as chorus with a quick fade out after the last words.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
N.C.
[ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7/C[/ch]
[ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7/C[/ch]
[ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7/C[/ch]
[ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 Why am I,  standing on a cloud[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 Every time you're a-round[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 And my sadness disap-pears[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 Every time you are near[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am11[/ch] [ch]Gmaj9/B[/ch]    [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]
 You must be an angel[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7/C[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]B7sus4[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 I can  see it in  your   eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7/C[/ch]  [ch]Am11[/ch]   [ch]Gmaj9/B[/ch] [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]
 Full of wonder and sur-prise[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7/C[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]B7sus4[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7/C[/ch]
 And just now, I re -al -  ized[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7/C[/ch]
 Ooh, you're an angel[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7/C[/ch]
 Ooh, you're an angel[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7/C[/ch]
 Ooh, you're an angel[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
In dis-guise, I can see it in your eyes[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Walking down a crowded ave-nue[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 Other faces seem like nothing next to you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 And I can't hear the traffic rushing by[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 Just the pounding of my heart and that's why[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am11[/ch] [ch]Gmaj9/B[/ch]    [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]
 You must be an angel[/tab]
